source: Items 5-17, Exhibit D (Franchise Agreement), Exhibit E (Guaranty), Exhibit G (HITS)

grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to use System at specified location under Tapestry brand
grant_and_term.relicensing: At franchisor's sole discretion, potentially materially different terms

fee_obligations.program_fee: 4% GRR monthly (may increase up to +1% over term)
fee_obligations.payment_method: May require wire transfer/electronic funds transfer at franchisee's cost
fee_obligations.set_off: Franchisor may reduce any payment by amounts franchisee owes

construction_requirements.architect_approval: Must obtain franchisor's prior written consent for architect, designer, GC, major subs
construction_requirements.plans_approval: May not start construction until plans approved; no changes without advance consent
construction_requirements.ada_compliance: Architect must certify ADA compliance before and after construction

training_obligations.pre_opening: GM and key personnel must complete required training programs
training_obligations.ongoing: Brand Conference annually, replacement personnel must complete training, compliance training annual
training_obligations.cost_burden: Franchisee pays all course fees, travel, lodging, food expenses for attendees
training_obligations.trainer_expenses: Franchisee may also pay trainer travel/lodging for on-site programs

operational_obligations.management_company: Must be approved by franchisor; 90 days to replace if lost
operational_obligations.quality_assurance: Periodic inspections, Stay Score assessments, Service Quality Improvement Program
operational_obligations.reservation_service: Must use exclusively for outgoing referrals
operational_obligations.advertising_approval: All materials require prior franchisor approval
operational_obligations.rate_setting: Franchisor may suggest rates; may require rate parity across channels

noncompete.during_term: May not own/license/franchise Competing Brand. May be franchisee of Competing Brand. May manage (unless exclusive manager). Affiliates bound.
noncompete.competitor_definition: Any entity owning/licensing/franchising a brand competing with System in franchisor's sole judgment

guaranty.scope: Required guarantors (may include spouse) assume and agree to discharge certain franchisee obligations
guaranty.third_party_guaranty: May be required for lender comfort letters, certain loans, or upon default notice

liquidated_damages.pre_opening: System's Average Monthly Royalty × 60 (if site used for another hotel within 1 year, or after Hotel Work begins but before opening)
liquidated_damages.post_opening_first_2_years: Greater of Hotel's or System's Average Monthly Royalty × 60
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Hotel's Average Monthly Royalty × remaining months
liquidated_damages.calculation_notes: Excludes temporary financial accommodations and business interruptions from measurement period

dispute_resolution.venue: E.D. Virginia (Alexandria) or Fairfax County, VA or NY, NY
dispute_resolution.governing_law: New York (without choice of law principles)

insurance.requirement: Must maintain minimum levels and types specified in Manual
insurance.if_franchisee_fails: Franchisor may obtain insurance at franchisee's expense
insurance.amounts_not_disclosed: Vary widely by location, size, coverage type — cannot be estimated

indemnification.scope: Must defend, indemnify, hold harmless franchisor, Hilton Worldwide, subsidiaries, affiliates, officers, directors, employees, agents, successors, assigns
indemnification.trigger: Any claim, demand, tax, penalty, or proceeding arising from claimed occurrence at Hotel

force_majeure.casualty: Must inform franchisor immediately if Hotel damaged by fire, casualty, or force majeure. If closing required, may repair/rebuild within 18 months. If not, franchisor may terminate.
force_majeure.5_day_rule: Failure to operate 5 consecutive days is non-curable default, unless due to Force Majeure and reasonable steps taken

distinctive_clauses.non_renewable_term: Explicitly: 'This Agreement confers on you absolutely no rights of license renewal or extension whatsoever following the Expiration Date.'
distinctive_clauses.data_ownership: All guest data, hotel information, and information from reservations/loyalty programs is franchisor's property
distinctive_clauses.no_domain_names: Franchisee may not register, own, or maintain any domain names or sites relating to System/Brand
distinctive_clauses.mandatory_guest_fee_consent: May not charge any Mandatory Guest Fee without franchisor consent
distinctive_clauses.competitor_management_company: If Management Company becomes Competitor, 90 days to replace
distinctive_clauses.marketing_materials_ownership: Any marketing materials franchisee develops and franchisor approves may be used by other System hotels without compensation
